---
name: Public-safe learning note
description: Propose a small public-safe learning note
title: "Add public-safe note: <short topic>"
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Goal

Describe the public-safe learning note in one or two sentences.

## Scope

What file or note should be added or improved?

Suggested path:

`notes/learning/<short-name>.md`

## Public-Safe Focus

This note should focus on:

- learning discipline
- documentation rhythm
- review habits
- small improvement loops
- safe public proof

## Safety Boundary

Confirm this note will not include:

- [ ] private architecture
- [ ] internal names
- [ ] product mechanics
- [ ] detailed workflows
- [ ] customer strategy
- [ ] market positioning
- [ ] private prompts
- [ ] proprietary methods
- [ ] broker or execution details
- [ ] customer data
- [ ] performance claims
- [ ] financial advice claims
- [ ] production readiness claims

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The note is small and reviewable.
- [ ] The note is high-level and non-sensitive.
- [ ] The note stays inside the public boundary.
- [ ] CI remains passing.
